title: A gentle welcome the first time you open a view
summary: xNet now greets you with light, one-at-a-time tips the first time you open a view — what ⌘K does, where your CRM lives, how Tasks work — each dismissible and never in the way. Replay them anytime from Settings → Tips & tours.
highlights: One tip at a time, shown the first time you reach a view — not a blocking tour
Dismiss with Escape, the ✕, or 'Got it' — it never steals focus or blocks the app
Replay onboarding anytime from Settings → Tips & tours
